search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: Choice Theory Choice Theory July 23 2011What is Choice Theory? Developed by psychiatrist William Glasser , Choice Theory states we are motivated by a never-ending quest to satisfy the following 5 basic needs woven into our genes: to love and belong, to be powerful, to be free, to have fun and to survive. Behavior
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Choice Theory and motivation in psychology, not sports or techniques to improve athletic performance.
